timestamp_rule: feature valuation must be strictly before prediction date
PIT only when contract_is_pit true or raw snapshot predates transfer
executable_assertion: assert contract snapshot date < transfer date

timestamp_rule: fit within each temporal train split
executable_assertion: unit test pipeline fit per split
grep/sklearn split audit plus fold table

timestamp_rule: deal key must be assigned to one split
executable_assertion: assert duplicate deal key not split
assert max feature season < prediction season

timestamp_rule: fit inflation index using training period only
executable_assertion: assert inflation fit window <= train max

timestamp_rule: future MV target must flag transfer-contaminated observations
executable_assertion: exclude/flag valuations after subsequent paid transfer

timestamp_rule: calibration split separate from final test
exclude unless model estimand is buyer-specific
